title: Inspect /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web only. Return concise summary in <=8 bullets: implemented features, likely unfinished parts, and testing gaps, with file paths. Do not edit.
summary_text: - Implemented: mobile-first multi-screen shell (Home/Work/Live/Recover), task sheet, composer, sync pills/actions, and recovery UI are fully wired in [index.html](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/index.html), [src/app.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js), and [styles.css](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/styles.css). - Implemented: local-first event-sourced state model with projection, dedupe, and compaction (`eventLog`, base snapshot, cursor resume) in [src/domain/happy-event-store.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/domain/happy-event-store.js), [src/domain/happy-state-projector.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/domain/happy-state-projector.js), and [src/domain/happy-event-normalizers.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/domain/happy-event-normalizers.js). - Implemented: queue-first intake/recovery pipeline with idempotency, deferred retry, remote event feed + snapshot fallback, and task-detail incremental sync in [src/adapters/happy-app-intake.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-app-intake.js), [src/adapters/happy-app-state.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-app-state.js), and [src/adapters/happy-app-recovery.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-app-recovery.js). - Implemented: auth-stale handling + reauth return flow + gateway UI; includes safe `returnTo` sanitization and token extraction in [src/domain/happy-auth-reentry.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/domain/happy-auth-reentry.js), [src/domain/happy-auth-gateway.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/domain/happy-auth-gateway.js), and [auth/auth.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/auth/auth.js). - Implemented: coordinated token refresh across tabs/workers (BroadcastChannel + lock fallback) in [src/adapters/happy-endpoint-client.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-endpoint-client.js) and [src/domain/happy-auth-session.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/domain/happy-auth-session.js). - Likely unfinished: `crowEndpoint` is configurable but appears unused in runtime behavior (suggests planned remote Crow integration not yet connected) in [src/config/happy-runtime-config.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/config/happy-runtime-config.js) and [src/adapters/happy-app-crow.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-app-crow.js). - Likely unfinished/risky: startup/service-worker failures are intentionally swallowed (`catch(() => {})`), which hides runtime faults; shell cache also preloads only a subset of JS modules in [src/app.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js) and [sw.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/sw.js). - Testing gaps: strong unit/integration coverage exists ([tests/test-behavior-contract.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-behavior-contract.js), [tests/test-endpoint-client.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-endpoint-client.js), [tests/test-event-store-compaction.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-event-store-compaction.js)), but shell tests are mostly grep-based contract checks ([tests/test-view-contract.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-view-contract.sh), [tests/test-state-contract.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-state-contract.sh), [tests/test-design-contract.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-design-contract.sh), [tests/test-pwa-shell.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-pwa-shell.sh)); no real-browser E2...
